steps.title: Identify the conclusion to support
steps.content: Alegado and colleagues concluded that neither C. crescentus nor S. ruber played a significant role in the development of multicellular organisms.

steps.title: Determine what evidence rules out both bacteria
steps.content:
For both bacteria to be ruled out, S. rosetta must show no colony-forming response to either one.

The research treats colony formation as evidence of involvement in multicellular evolution, so no response rules out involvement.

The correct answer shows exactly this: no colonies formed in response to either bacterium.

Choices A, B, and D each show at least one response, contradicting the “neither” conclusion.

That confirms C is correct.
